uaeRelations.diplomaticStatus: Major Non-NATO Ally status; strong security partnership

keyUAEInvestors: Abu Dhabi Investment Authority ($130B US portfolio)

uaeRelations.strategicImportance: UAE is the US's largest trading partner in the Arab world. Al-Dhafra Air Base hosts 2,000 US troops. $1.4 trillion UAE–US investment framework (2023 Lula parallel). AI chips supply chain currently restricted under BIS rules — active negotiation.

opportunities.title: AI Chip and Data Center Partnership
opportunities.description: MGX and G42 seeking NVIDIA H100/H200 access for UAE sovereign AI cloud. US BIS export controls are primary obstacle. Biden-era restrictions partially lifted under Trump 2025.

opportunities.title: LNG Supply Agreement
opportunities.description: ADNOC signed 15-year LNG offtake with Venture Global. Expanding to Calcasieu Pass 2 terminal adds 1.5Mtpa UAE LNG supply.

riskFactors.title: AI Export Controls
riskFactors.description: US BIS restrictions on advanced AI chips (NVIDIA A100/H100) to UAE entities. G42's Huawei divestment condition partially lifted but cloud AI still restricted.
riskFactors.mitigation: Engage US Commerce Dept through UAE Embassy for Entity List removal

keyMeetingTopics: AI chip export control negotiations — BIS Entity List
UAE sovereign wealth fund US tech portfolio expansion
